3300–3399 
Children's hospitals (excluded from PPS) where TOB = 11X; ESRD clinic where TOB = 72X 
4000–4499 
Psychiatric hospitals 
5000–6499 
Skilled nursing facilities 
COMMENT: 
If you want additional information about the institutional provider, the quarterly CMS Provider of 
Services (POS) file contains dozens of variables that describe the characteristics of the provider. This file 
is updated quarterly, and effective May 2014 is available for free online from the CMS website
